# L3 Domain

Get default properties of [all](./DomainL3All.md) L3 Domains in selected APIC.

Filter options:
  - [name](./DomainL3Name.md)

Output options:
  - [default](./DomainL3All.md)
  - [json](./DomainL3OutputJson.md)

Command options

```
DOC_TEMPLATE:get_aci_domain_l3.help:output
```
